cache.title: Cache Browser
cache.subtitle: Per-protocol view of what the proxy has cached — name, version, and the achieved trust tier for each artifact.

oci.tierContext: cosign keyed verification → signed · first-use digest lock → tofu · no cosign config → checksum
oci.emptyMsg: No OCI images cached yet. Pull an image through the proxy to populate this view.

pypi.tierContext: cross-mirror sha256 quorum (PEP 503 simple-index) → consensus · first-use digest lock → tofu
pypi.emptyMsg: No PyPI packages cached yet. Set the proxy as your pip index and run pip install.

npm.tierContext: registry tarball sha integrity quorum → consensus · first-use digest lock → tofu
npm.emptyMsg: No npm packages cached yet. Point npm/yarn/pnpm at the proxy registry and install a package.

go.tierContext: sumdb Ed25519 Merkle proof (tree head + inclusion proof) → signed · absent sumdb → tofu
go.emptyMsg: No Go modules cached yet. Set GOPROXY to the proxy address and run go get.

apt.tierContext: distro keyring GPG over InRelease → signed · pool .deb files → checksum (no per-file GPG)
apt.emptyMsg: No apt packages cached yet. Configure /etc/apt/sources.list to use the proxy.

helm.tierContext: .prov GPG provenance file verified against keyring → signed · no .prov → tofu
helm.emptyMsg: No Helm charts cached yet. Add the proxy as a Helm repo and run helm pull.

git.tierContext: signed tag/commit (allowed-signers) → signed · first-clone object hash lock → tofu · git SHA detects force-push history rewrites
git.emptyMsg: No git repositories mirrored yet. Clone through the proxy to build the local mirror.

tarball.tierContext: cross-mirror digest quorum → consensus · first-use digest lock → tofu
